title: DRW MD-DRW-516: FCU Mounting & Interface
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-516 Rev A — FCU Mounting & Interface

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1091, P-1103, P-1104, P-1106.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Felix Herrera, approved by Sam Dreher.
